manual_ref: Web Services Guide Rev D, Table 212 (physicalLibrary/elements)
fidelity_notes: SUSPECT COORDINATE SHAPE: with a session the emulator returns element coordinates as a reduced 3-tuple STRING (e.g. '1,1,1'), even though aml_state holds full {frame,rack,section,column,row,type} dicts. The real i3 exposes the full physical coordinate. Modeled now as ScalarCoordinate (openblade/domain/scalar_coordinate.py); applying it to this response is a wire change that must be certified against a capture + re-verified vs the i3 parity tests.
